encrypt-pdf-owner-password-high-res-prin.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password and High‑Resolution Printing
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-high-res-prin.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using an owner password, enable high‑resolution printing, and block copying by setting permissions with Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-pdf-using-owner-password.title: Decrypt Password-Protected PDF Using Owner Password
decrypt-pdf-using-owner-password.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with the owner password, decrypting it, and saving the unprotected version using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-privileges-disable-extraction-fo.title: Set PDF Privileges to Disable Extraction and Form Filling
set-pdf-privileges-disable-extraction-fo.description: Demonstrates how to load an already signed PDF and apply permission restrictions to allow only printing while disabling content extraction and form filling using Aspose.Pdf.

add-visible-digital-signature-second-pag.title: Add Visible Digital Signature to Second Page of PDF
add-visible-digital-signature-second-pag.description: Demonstrates how to place a visible PKCS#7 digital signature in the bottom‑right corner of the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-invisible-digital-signature-to-pdf.title: Add Invisible Digital Signature with Timestamp to PDF
add-invisible-digital-signature-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply an invisible PKCS#7 digital signature to an existing PDF, recording the signing time and using incremental updates to keep the original layout unchanged.

enumerate-pdf-signature-fields.title: Enumerate PDF Signature Fields and Show Basic Info
enumerate-pdf-signature-fields.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates over its form fields to locate signature fields, and prints basic signature details such as authority, location, and reason using the core Aspose.Pdf API.

extract-signature-field-metadata.title: Extract Signature Field Metadata from PDF
extract-signature-field-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enumerate signature form fields, and retrieve their properties and signature details for auditing purposes.

extract-images-from-signed-pdf.title: Extract Images from Signed PDF to PNG
extract-images-from-signed-pdf.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates through each page, extracts embedded images, and saves them as PNG files in a specified folder.

remove-digital-signature-from-pdf.title: Remove Digital Signature from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
remove-digital-signature-from-pdf.description: Shows how to strip a digital signature from a PDF by enabling signature sanitization and saving the document, provided the PDF permissions allow it.

sign-pdf-with-smart-card.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card Certificate
sign-pdf-with-smart-card.description: Shows how to load a PDF, let the user pick a certificate from a smart card, and apply a digital signature using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-smart-card__v2.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card Certificate without PIN Prompt
sign-pdf-with-smart-card__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF and sign it using a smart‑card X509Certificate2 via Aspose.Pdf, avoiding any PIN prompt.

custom-security-handler-logging-pdf-acce.title: Custom Security Handler Logging PDF Access
custom-security-handler-logging-pdf-acce.description: Demonstrates how to implement a custom ICustomSecurityHandler that logs encryption/decryption operations and password checks, then encrypts and opens a PDF using the handler.

encrypt-pdf-custom-security-handler.title: Encrypt PDF with Custom Security Handler to Disable Copy‑Paste
encrypt-pdf-custom-security-handler.description: Demonstrates how to apply a custom security handler when encrypting a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting permissions that allow printing but block content extraction (copy‑paste).

sign-pdf-with-trusted-timestamp.title: Sign PDF with Trusted Timestamp
sign-pdf-with-trusted-timestamp.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a signature field, create a PKCS#7 signature using a certificate, configure timestamp settings from a TSA, and save the signed document.

validate-pkcs7-detached-signature.title: Validate PKCS#7 Detached Signature and Certificate Chain in a PDF
validate-pkcs7-detached-signature.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its signature fields, verifies each PKCS#7 detached signature with strict validation, and displays the validation status, error messages, and the signing certificate chain.

validate-pdf-digital-signature-ocsp.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature Using OCSP
validate-pdf-digital-signature-ocsp.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, locate signature fields, and verify each signature's revocation status using OCSP with Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-signature-crl.title: Validate PDF Signature Using CRL Revocation Checking
validate-pdf-signature-crl.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate signature fields, and verify the digital signature using CRL distribution points to confirm revocation status.

extract-signing-time-utc.title: Extract Signing Time from PDF Signature and Convert to UTC
extract-signing-time-utc.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the first signature field, retrieve the signing time, and convert it to UTC.

extract-certificate-chain-from-pdf-signa.title: Extract Certificate Chain from PDF Signature
extract-certificate-chain-from-pdf-signa.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates over its signature fields, extracts the leaf certificate, builds the X509 chain, and saves each certificate in DER format.

sign-pdf-with-reason-contact-location.title: Sign PDF with Reason, Contact, and Location
sign-pdf-with-reason-contact-location.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF and sign it using a PFX certificate while setting the Reason, ContactInfo, and Location properties.

sign-pdf-with-custom-image-appearance.title: Sign PDF with Custom Image Appearance
sign-pdf-with-custom-image-appearance.description: Shows how to create a visible signature field on a PDF page and sign it using a PKCS#1 signature with a custom graphic image as the appearance.

certify-pdf-prevent-modifications.title: Certify PDF to Prevent Further Modifications
certify-pdf-prevent-modifications.description: Shows how to add a certification signature to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and set SignaturesAppendOnly so any later changes invalidate the signature.

certify-pdf-form-filling-permission.title: Certify PDF with Form Filling Permission
certify-pdf-form-filling-permission.description: Shows how to apply a DocMDP certification signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, allowing form filling while blocking other content modifications.

certify-pdf-append-only-signature.title: Certify PDF with Append-Only Signature to Allow Annotations
certify-pdf-append-only-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a certification signature to a PDF that permits further annotations by enabling incremental updates.

sign-pdf-with-pkcs1-signature.title: Sign PDF with PKCS#1 Signature (no certification)
sign-pdf-with-pkcs1-signature.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a signature field, and applying a PKCS#1 digital signature using Aspose.Pdf. It notes that DocMDP certification with post‑signing permissions requires the Facades API.

lock-form-fields-after-digital-signature.title: Lock Form Fields After Digital Signature in PDF
lock-form-fields-after-digital-signature.description: Shows how to add a digital signature to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and then make selected form fields read‑only to prevent further user edits.

digitally-sign-pdf-lock-readonly.title: Digitally Sign PDF and Lock It for Read‑Only Access
digitally-sign-pdf-lock-readonly.description: The example loads a PDF, adds a digital signature field, signs it with a PKCS#7 certificate, then encrypts the document with no permissions to enforce a read‑only state, and finally saves the locked PDF.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-user-owner-password.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Set User/Owner Passwords
encrypt-pdf-aes256-user-owner-password.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply AES‑256 encryption, set both user and owner passwords, define allowed permissions, and save the encrypted document.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-bit-restrict-editing.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 128‑bit and Restrict Editing
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-bit-restrict-editing.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying 128‑bit RC4 encryption with user and owner passwords, restricting permissions to printing only, and saving the encrypted document.

decrypt-pdf-extract-embedded-images.title: Decrypt PDF and Extract Embedded Images
decrypt-pdf-extract-embedded-images.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with a user password, decrypting it, and extracting all embedded images to separate files.

decrypt-pdf-update-metadata.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password and Update Metadata
decrypt-pdf-update-metadata.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF using the owner password, decrypting it, modifying document metadata (title, author, subject, keywords), and saving the updated file.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-by-filename.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords Derived from File Names
batch-encrypt-pdfs-by-filename.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, creating user and owner passwords from each file name and saving the encrypted files to a separate output directory.

batch-decrypt-pdfs-lookup.title: Batch Decrypt Password-Protected PDFs Using a Lookup Table
batch-decrypt-pdfs-lookup.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt multiple password‑protected PDF files in a folder by reading passwords from a CSV lookup table and saving the decrypted versions.

batch-sign-pdfs-by-author-certificate.title: Batch Sign PDFs Using Author Metadata to Select Certificates
batch-sign-pdfs-by-author-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDFs, read each document's Author metadata, choose a matching certificate, add a signature field, and apply a PKCS#7 signature using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-sign-pdfs-unique-visible-signature.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Unique Visible Signature Images
batch-sign-pdfs-unique-visible-signature.description: Demonstrates how to process multiple PDF files, add a distinct visible signature image to each, and apply a digital PKCS#7 signature using a common certificate.

batch-encrypt-and-sign-pdfs.title: Batch Encrypt and Sign PDFs
batch-encrypt-and-sign-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files with AES‑256 and then apply a PKCS#7 digital signature to each encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-print-only-permission.title: Encrypt PDF with Print‑Only Permission
encrypt-pdf-print-only-permission.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, and restrict permissions so that only printing is allowed.

encrypt-pdf-allow-copy-block-print.title: Encrypt PDF and Allow Copying While Blocking Printing
encrypt-pdf-allow-copy-block-print.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256, permit content extraction (copy) and disable printing by setting appropriate permissions with Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-with-print-copy-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with Printing and Copying Permissions
encrypt-pdf-with-print-copy-permissions.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, and enable printing and content extraction permissions.

encrypt-pdf-restrict-content-extraction.title: Encrypt PDF and Restrict Content Extraction
encrypt-pdf-restrict-content-extraction.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption, and setting permissions to allow only printing while disabling content extraction, then saving the protected file.

decrypt-extract-images-reencrypt-pdf.title: Decrypt PDF, Extract Images, and Re‑encrypt with New Owner Password
decrypt-extract-images-reencrypt-pdf.description: The example loads an encrypted PDF using a user password, extracts all embedded images to a folder, and then re‑encrypts the document with a new owner password and specific permissions.

download-sign-upload-pdf-azure-blob.title: Download, Sign, and Upload PDF to Azure Blob Storage
download-sign-upload-pdf-azure-blob.description: The sample downloads a PDF (with a local fallback), adds a digital signature using a PFX certificate, and uploads the signed document to Azure Blob Storage.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-password.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-with-user-password.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, applies AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, and returns the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

sign-pdf-with-windows-certificate.title: Sign PDF with Windows Store Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-windows-certificate.description: Demonstrates loading an X509 certificate from the CurrentUser store by thumbprint, adding a visible signature field to a PDF, and signing the document with Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-hardware-token.title: Sign PDF Using a Hardware Token (PKCS#11)
sign-pdf-with-hardware-token.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a visible signature field, obtaining a certificate from a hardware token via the Windows store, and signing the document with Aspose.Pdf's ExternalSignature.

validate-pdf-signature.title: Validate PDF Signature and Report Errors
validate-pdf-signature.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates through its signature fields, and validates each signature against a trusted root CA using strict validation options, reporting any validation errors.

validate-pdf-signature-timestamp.title: Validate PDF Signature and Verify Timestamp Within Certificate Validity
validate-pdf-signature-timestamp.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF, locate signature fields, verify each signature using strict validation, extract the signing certificate, and ensure the signing timestamp falls inside the certificate's validity period.

extract-signature-image-to-png.title: Extract Signature Image from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-signature-image-to-png.description: Loads a PDF document, locates the first signature field, extracts its appearance image as a JPEG stream, and saves it as a PNG file.

extract-signature-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Signature Images from PDF
extract-signature-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, iterate through its signature fields, and save each field's appearance as a JPEG image.

extract-images-from-signed-pdf__v2.title: Extract Images from Each Page of a Signed PDF
extract-images-from-signed-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, extract all embedded images, and save them as PNG files in page‑specific folders.

extract-verify-certificate-chain-expirat.title: Extract and Verify Certificate Chain Expiration in a Signed PDF
extract-verify-certificate-chain-expirat.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts each signature's certificate, builds the certificate chain, and checks the expiration date of every certificate in the chain.

custom-security-handler-disable-copy-pas.title: Apply Custom Security Handler to Disable Copy‑Paste with Warning Overlay
custom-security-handler-disable-copy-pas.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible warning annotation to each PDF page and protect the document with a custom security handler that disables copy‑paste functionality.

sign-pdf-and-flatten-signature.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Signature Appearance
sign-pdf-and-flatten-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate, flatten the signature appearance to prevent further visual changes, and save the signed document.

sign-pdf-remove-annotations-except-signa.title: Sign PDF and Remove All Annotations Except Signature
sign-pdf-remove-annotations-except-signa.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then programmatically delete all annotations while preserving the signature field.

encrypt-pdf-with-password.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Permissions
encrypt-pdf-with-password.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, requiring a user password to open, setting allowed permissions, and saving the protected document.

encrypt-pdf-view-only-edit-password.title: Encrypt PDF with view‑only access and edit password
encrypt-pdf-view-only-edit-password.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so it can be opened without a password for viewing, while requiring an owner password for editing and applying specific permissions.

decrypt-pdf-re-sign-fields.title: Decrypt PDF and Re‑sign Each Signature Field with Different Certificates
decrypt-pdf-re-sign-fields.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF, removes its password protection, locates all signature fields, and applies a new PKCS#7 signature to each field using a distinct certificate.

batch-sign-and-compress-pdfs.title: Batch Sign and Compress PDFs
batch-sign-and-compress-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files, add a PKCS#7 digital signature field to each document, optimize resources to compress the file, and save the signed PDFs.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-zip.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs and Archive to ZIP
batch-encrypt-pdfs-zip.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files with unique passwords using Aspose.Pdf and store the encrypted documents in a ZIP archive.

extract-digest-algorithm-from-pdf-signat.title: Extract Digest Algorithm from PDF Digital Signatures
extract-digest-algorithm-from-pdf-signat.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields, identifies signature fields, and logs the digest hash algorithm used in each digital signature for compliance reporting.

sign-pdf-with-sha384.title: Sign PDF with SHA‑384 Digest Using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-sha384.description: Demonstrates how to create a digital signature field in a PDF and sign it using a certificate with the SHA‑384 hash algorithm via Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-sha512-digest.title: Sign PDF with SHA‑512 Digest Using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-sha512-digest.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible signature field to a PDF and sign it with a certificate using the SHA‑512 digest algorithm for enhanced security.

sign-pdf-rsa-4096.title: Sign PDF with RSA 4096‑bit Certificate
sign-pdf-rsa-4096.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible signature field to a PDF and sign it using a 4096‑bit RSA private key stored in a PFX certificate with Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

sign-pdf-with-ecc-p256.title: Sign PDF with ECC P‑256 Certificate
sign-pdf-with-ecc-p256.description: Demonstrates how to load an ECC P‑256 certificate from a PFX file and apply a digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-with-certificate.title: Encrypt PDF with Certificate from Smart Card/HSM
encrypt-pdf-with-certificate.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using a public certificate stored in a smart‑card or HSM, applying AES‑256 encryption and specific permissions.

decrypt-pdf-with-certificate-token.title: Decrypt PDF Using Certificate from Hardware Token
decrypt-pdf-with-certificate-token.description: Shows how to open a PDF encrypted with a certificate, retrieve the private key from a hardware token (or store), decrypt the document, and save the unencrypted version using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-sign-pdfs-with-doc-type-certificat.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Document-Type Specific Certificates
batch-sign-pdfs-with-doc-type-certificat.description: Demonstrates how to sign multiple PDF files in a folder, selecting a certificate based on each document's type metadata and applying the signature to all signature fields.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-date-based-passw.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Date-Based Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-date-based-passw.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a unique password for each file from its name and the current date.

list-signature-fields-add-empty-signatur.title: List Existing Signature Fields and Add a New Empty Signature Field
list-signature-fields-add-empty-signatur.description: The example loads a PDF, enumerates all existing signature fields, disables automatic sanitization, creates a new empty signature field on the first page, and saves the modified document.

sign-pdf-with-embedded-xfa.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XFA Form Data
sign-pdf-with-embedded-xfa.description: Demonstrates how to embed a custom XFA XML data block into a PDF form and then digitally sign the document using a PKCS#7 certificate.

validate-pdf-signature-extract-san.title: Validate PDF Signature and Extract Certificate SAN
validate-pdf-signature-extract-san.description: Shows how to verify a digital signature in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and retrieve the signing certificate's Subject Alternative Name entries.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-owner-passwords-re.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords and Remove User Password
encrypt-pdf-with-user-owner-passwords-re.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with both user and owner passwords and specific permissions, then reopening it with the owner password to clear the user password while keeping the file encrypted.

sign-pdf-flatten-form-fields.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Form Fields
sign-pdf-flatten-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to add a PKCS#7 signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then flatten all form fields to prevent further editing, and finally save the signed document.

encrypt-pdf-disable-printing.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Disable Printing
encrypt-pdf-disable-printing.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 with user and owner passwords while restricting permissions to prevent printing.

extract-signature-field-names-from-pdf.title: Extract Signature Field Names and Page Numbers from PDF
extract-signature-field-names-from-pdf.description: The example loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, iterates through its form fields, identifies signature fields, and prints each field's full name along with the page number it appears on.

retrieve-signature-reason-location.title: Retrieve Reason and Location from PDF Signatures
retrieve-signature-reason-location.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields, and extracts the Reason and Location metadata from each digital signature field.

compute-verify-pdf-hash-before-after-sig.title: Compute and Verify PDF Hash Before and After Signing
compute-verify-pdf-hash-before-after-sig.description: Shows how to calculate a SHA‑256 hash of a PDF before signing, sign the document, recompute the hash after signing, compare the hashes for integrity, and optionally run the SignaturesCompromiseDetector.

encrypted-pdf-with-attachment-and-signat.title: Create Encrypted PDF with Attachment and Digital Signature
encrypted-pdf-with-attachment-and-signat.description: The example shows how to embed a file into a PDF, encrypt the document with a certificate using AES‑256, add a signature field, and apply a digital signature using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-embed-xmp-metadata.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XMP Metadata
sign-pdf-embed-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate and embed custom XMP metadata describing the signing details.

sign-pdf-embed-custom-xml.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XML Signature Data
sign-pdf-embed-custom-xml.description: Demonstrates adding a visible signature field, applying a PKCS#7 digital signature, and embedding hidden custom XML data into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-and-lock-signature-field.title: Sign PDF and Lock Signature Field
sign-pdf-and-lock-signature-field.description: Shows how to add a digital signature to a PDF, make the signature field read‑only, and prevent any further modifications using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-incremental-signature.title: Sign PDF with Incremental Signature for Future Additions
sign-pdf-incremental-signature.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while enabling incremental updates so other users can add additional signatures later.

sign-pdf-prevent-additional-signatures.title: Sign PDF and Prevent Additional Signatures
sign-pdf-prevent-additional-signatures.description: Shows how to add a visible PKCS#7 signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and lock the document against further signatures by enabling append‑only mode.
